summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of DentaCare Dhaka dental clinic website. All core functionality working properly including navigation, forms, admin panel, and mobile responsiveness.

ui_bugs.issue: Phone validation too strict for Bangladesh numbers - rejects '+880 1700-123456' format

integration_issues.issue: Form submission fails due to strict phone validation, preventing localStorage save

passed_tests: Homepage loads with hero section, navbar, and all sections visible
Navigation to /services page works and shows dental services
Navigation to /doctors page works and shows doctors
Navigation to /appointment page works and form is visible
Appointment form validation - submit empty form shows all required field errors
Navigation to /contact page works with contact form and map
Admin login with password 'admin123' works correctly
Admin dashboard shows appointments list (empty state)
Mobile menu toggle works on smaller screens
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix phone validation in AppointmentForm.jsx to accept common Bangladesh phone formats like '+880 1700-123456' or '01700123456'. Currently validation is too strict and prevents successful form submission.
